## Feature Prioritization (RICE Framework)

Use the RICE scoring method to prioritize features:

| Feature     | Reach     | Impact | Confidence | Effort          | RICE Score   |
| ----------- | --------- | ------ | ---------- | --------------- | ------------ |
| [Feature 1] | [# users] | [1-3]  | [0.5-1.0]  | [person-months] | [Calculated] |
| [Feature 2] | [# users] | [1-3]  | [0.5-1.0]  | [person-months] | [Calculated] |
| [Feature 3] | [# users] | [1-3]  | [0.5-1.0]  | [person-months] | [Calculated] |

### RICE Scoring Guide

- **Reach**: How many users will be affected in a given time period?
- **Impact**: How much will this move the needle? (3=massive, 2=high, 1=medium, 0.5=low)
- **Confidence**: How confident are we in our estimates? (1.0=high, 0.8=medium, 0.5=low)
- **Effort**: How many person-months will this take?

**RICE Score** = (Reach × Impact × Confidence) / Effort

### Example Calculation

| Feature             | Reach | Impact | Confidence | Effort | RICE Score |
| ------------------- | ----- | ------ | ---------- | ------ | ---------- |
| User Authentication | 1000  | 3      | 0.9        | 2      | 1350       |
| Export to PDF       | 500   | 2      | 0.8        | 1      | 800        |
| Dark Mode           | 200   | 1      | 0.7        | 0.5    | 280        |
